verdict.answer_first: A gets to the concrete improvement slightly faster with "Better is to fetch all the users in a single query keyed by id" before listing alternatives; B first labels the issue then says "Two fixes, best first".
verdict.decisiveness: A is more decisive with "I'd go with the include/join approach if these are associated models; otherwise the batched-Map version"; B says "Single batched query (best)" then "Eager-load / join... (even better)", which is less clean.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now: it gives the batch-map code, then the ORM include path, then the fallback, with less extra branching.
